name: Konobi
author: Luis Bolaños Mures (2012) / AGP port
description: Drawless connection game on the points of a square board. Black links top-bottom, White left-right; chains use strong (orthogonal) and weak (diagonal) links — but the signature kosumi rule forbids a weak attachment to a stone whenever a clean strong attachment to it is available, and crosscuts are banned outright. Pie rule on move 2.
